task_completion.description: Configure the ground station (QTH) named 'GeorgiaTech' with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict Ground Station configuration window or Preferences showing Name: 'GeorgiaTech', Latitude: 33.7756, Longitude: -84.3963 (or 84.3963 W), and Altitude: 320.
Look for the GPredict Rotator configuration window showing Name: 'G5500_AzEl', Host: 'localhost', Port: '4533', Azimuth type: '0-450', and Elevation type: '0-180'.

task_completion.description: Configure the downlink (RX) radio interface named 'IC9700_DL'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Radio configuration window showing Name: 'IC9700_DL', Host: 'localhost', and Port: '4532'.

task_completion.description: Configure the uplink (TX) radio interface named 'IC9700_UL'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Radio configuration window showing Name: 'IC9700_UL', Host: 'localhost', and Port: '4534'.
Look for a new module tab or window in the main GPredict interface titled 'AutoTrack'.

task_completion.description: Add the 5 specified satellites to the 'AutoTrack' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'AutoTrack' module's satellite list or radar view to confirm the presence of ISS (ZARYA), SO-50, AO-91, AO-92, and CAS-4B.

integrity.description: Agent used the GPredict GUI to configure settings rather than directly editing configuration files in a terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict application windows (Preferences, Hardware interfaces, Module configuration) being interacted with, not terminal text editors like nano or vim.

integrity.description: The configurations are applied within the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict interface is clearly visible with the configured elements, rather than a text file or a script echoing the requirements.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the requirements into a text editor or terminal to satisfy OCR.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values must be entered into the specific input fields of GPredict dialog boxes (e.g., QTH setup, Radio setup, Rotator setup).
